subparts.text: A class has boys and girls in the ratio 3:4. If there are 28 girls, how many boys are there? If 5 boys join the class, what will be the new ratio?
A ladder is placed against a wall such that its foot is at a distance of 2.5m from the wall and its top reaches a window 6m above the ground. Find the length of the ladder.
The points , lies on a straight line. Find the value of y at x=5 on the straight line using linear extrapolation.
A shape is formed with vertices , , and . What is its image with respect to the translation ->
Solve the following initial value problem: 2𝑥2𝑦′′ + 3𝑥𝑦′ −15𝑦= 0, 𝑦 = 0, 𝑦′ = 1
Integrate the function √𝑥+9 𝑥 with respect to x
Obtain the median for the following data: x 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 f 8 10 11 16 20 25 15 9 6
A bag contains 7 white, 6 red and 5 blue balls. 2 balls are drawn at random. Find the probability that they will both be white.
The area of a rectangular park is 2000 sq m. On a map with a scale of 1:500, what will be the area of the park represented on the map?
Describe the symmetries in a square.
Find the fuzzy union of A = {0.2, 0.5, 0.6} and B = {0.2, 0.1, 0.8}
Find the modulus and the argument of the complex number 𝑧= 7 5
Find the area of the shaded region where ABCD is a square with side 20 cm.
A 5m wide cloth is used to make a conical tent of base diameter 14m and height 24m. Find the cost of cloth used at the rate of Rs 25/m 2
Find the equation of the plane passing through the points and and perpendicular to the plane 2𝑥+ 𝑦−𝑧+ 6 = 0.
Show that the lines 𝐿1: 𝑥−7 2 = 𝑦−10 3 = 𝑧−13 4 and 𝐿2: 𝑥−3 1 = 𝑦−5 2 = 𝑧−7 3 are coplanar
Find the equation of the sphere through the points , , and
Find the equation of the tangent plane at to the sphere 2 + 2 + 2 = 14

questions.question_text: Derive the reduction formula for ∫sinn 𝑥 𝑑𝑥. Hence find ∫sin5 𝑥 𝑑𝑥.

subparts.text: Find the Taylor series expansion of 𝑒𝑥+ log 𝑓𝑜𝑟 |𝑥| < 1
Find dimensions of a rectangle with perimeter 1000m such that its area is maximum.

questions.question_text: Calculate the coefficient of correlation and obtain the regression line of y on x for the following data. Obtain an estimate of y which corresponds to x = 6.2 x 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 f 9 8 10 12 11 13 14 16 15

subparts.text: In a bolt factory, machines A, B and C manufacture respectively 25%, 35% and 40% of the total. Of their output, 5%, 4% and 2% are defective. A bolt is drawn at random from the product and is found to be defective. What is the probability that it was manufactured by B?
A can hit a target 4 times in 5 shots, B 3 times in 4 shots, C twice in 3 shots. They fire a volley. What is the probability that at least 2 shots hit?
